ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (project) -> { id: project.Id, name: project.Name, developer: project.Developer_Name__c, logoUrl: project.Brand_Logo_URL__c default "", brandPrimaryColor: project.Brand_Primary_Color__c default "#1B4D8E", brandSecondaryColor: project.Brand_Secondary_Color__c default "#F5A623", description: project.Description__c default "", defaultCurrency: project.Default_Currency__c default "AED", status: project.Status__c, unitCount: project.Units__r.totalSize default 0 }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var project = payload[0] var units = project.Units__r.records default [] --- { id: project.Id, name: project.Name, developer: project.Developer_Name__c, logoUrl: project.Brand_Logo_URL__c default "", brandPrimaryColor: project.Brand_Primary_Color__c default "#1B4D8E", brandSecondaryColor: project.Brand_Secondary_Color__c default "#F5A623", description: project.Description__c default "", defaultCurrency: project.Default_Currency__c default "AED", status: project.Status__c, unitCount: sizeOf(units), unitsByStatus: units groupBy $.Status__c mapObject ((units, status) -> { (status): sizeOf(units) }) }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (unit) -> { id: unit.Id, unitNumber: unit.Unit_Number__c, building: unit.Building__c default "", floor: unit.Floor__c default 0, areaSqm: unit.Area_SQM__c default 0, areaSqft: unit.Area_SQFT__c default 0, unitType: unit.Unit_Type__c default "", status: unit.Status__c, handoverDate: unit.Handover_Date__c, totalPrice: unit.Total_Price__c default 0, floorPlanUrl: unit.Floor_Plan_URL__c default "", paymentCompletion: unit.Payment_Completion__c default 0, projectId: unit.Demo_Project__c, projectName: unit.Demo_Project__r.Name default "" }
